steps.label: Allow MFM and MFC to warm up

constraints.text: Allow the MFM and the MFC to warm up for at least 30 minutes without the charger attached to the MFM

steps.label: Record MFC display with pump off

IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Generate flow range using Flow_SetPt variable

constraints.text: For MFCs to be used at 1.5 Lpm, for example, do respective flows at 1.00, 1.25, 1.50, 1.75, 2.00, and 2.25 Lpm

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Record MFC display at each flow level

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Record Flow_Mass voltage at each flow level

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Record MFM measurement at each flow level

constraints.text: average of ten good runs, entered into the STP column

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Enter recorded data on Mass Flow Data Form As Left section
steps.action_object: recorded data on Mass Flow Data Form

constraints.text: At each level of flow, record the MFC display, the “Flow_Mass” (entered into the voltage column), and the MFM measurement (average of ten good runs, entered into the STP column) on the Mass Flow Data Form in the As Left section

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Compute Full Scale and Zero values from six point audit

constraints.text: Following a six point audit in the As Left section of the flow calibration form
The form will compute a Full Scale and Zero value for the MFC

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Enter computed values into data logger

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Adjust MFC set point to achieve target flow rate

constraints.text: Adjust the MFC set point to achieve a flow rate of 1.50 or 3.00 for the particular site
Using the average of ten good runs for the Definer

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

steps.label: Record post-calibration result on flow calibration form

constraints.text: Record the result on the flow calibration form in the Post Calibration row of the As Left section

provenance.section: IV.C.3 Mass Flow Controller — 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1–6.1.10)

constraints.text: After completing the calibration, tag the MFC, place it in a plastic bag and put it on the ready to ship shelf

[verbatim-grounding pass 2026-07-06, agent, pending human sign-off] Corrected procedure metadata: annotated unit is the Mass Flow Controller SOP section 6.0 Calibration / Post-Calibration (6.1.1-6.1.10), NOT '5.14 Repair' (5.14 is a one-line manufacturer-return note in the O3-monitor SOP); char span tightened 601180:612180 -> 609373:611246 to the exact unit. C2 restored verbatim ('for example' was dropped). C4 restored to the full 6.1.7 sentence (summarisation had removed the STP-column parenthetical). C3 re-grounded to the 6.1.7 parenthetical 'average of ten good runs, entered into the STP column' (its old text spliced wording from 6.1.9, which governs S14, not S10). Added missed constraints per guidelines source signals: C10 'using latex or Teflon tubing' (parameter, S3), C11 'With the vacuum pump off' (precondition, S5), C12 'Using the average of ten good runs for the Definer' (parameter, S14). 9 -> 12 constraints.
[relations pass 2026-07-06, agent, pending human sign-off] Step-graph relations annotated by hand: NEXT = document-order procedural succession; fork NEXT edges plus ALTERNATIVE_TO only where the source states mutually exclusive branches. Conditional in-step behaviour stays encoded as guard constraints. Loops (check-measurement repeat, per-vertical sampling) not modeled to keep the graph acyclic. NOTE: current Tier-B eval synthesizes a linear NEXT chain from steps-array order and does not read this field; relations are provided as explicit gold ordering/branching for graph consumers and export.
